---
title: "Decoding biodiversity through spatio-temporal spectral variations"
author: Duccio Rocchini
format:
  revealjs:
    self-contained: true
editor: visual
---

# Intro

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished presentation. To learn more about Quarto presentations see <https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/>.

## Bullets

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes:

-   Content authored with markdown
-   Output from executable code

# Coding

## Code

When you click the **Render** button a presentation will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
1 + 1
```

## Installare `imageRy`
Per installare `imageRy`:

```{r, echo=T}
# devtools::install_github("ducciorocchini/imageRy")
```

## Come installare `imageRy`
Si può usare `imageRy` installandolo da GitHub:

```{r, echo=T, eval=F}
devtools::install_github("ducciorocchini/imageRy")
```

## How to load `imageRy`
Si può usare `imageRy` come pacchetto:

```{r, echo=T}
library(imageRy) 
```


## Lista files
Lista di files in `imageRy`:

```{r, echo=T}
im.list()
```


## False evaluation
Lista di files in `imageRy` senza far partire la funzione:

```{r, echo=T, eval=F}
im.list()
```

## Importare un'immagine

```{r, echo=T}
library(terra)
blett <- im.import("bletterbach.jpg")
```

# Analisi dati

## Indici

Un potenziale indice riguarda la sottrazione delle prime due bande:

```{r, echo=T}
index <- blett[[1]] - blett[[2]]
plot(index)
```

## inserire un'immagine esterna

## Why space, time, and spectra matter

::: {style="text-align: center;"}
![](percorso/era.png){width="80%" align="center"}
:::
